seoTitle: Benowa vs Bentley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Benowa and Bentley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Benowa vs Bentley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Benowa and Bentley Park.
heading: Benowa vs Bentley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Benowa, Queensland and Bentley Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bentley Park has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Benowa (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Benowa or Bentley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Benowa has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Bentley Park scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Benowa scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Bentley Park scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Benowa or Bentley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bentley Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
